stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Some 19th-century European reformers sought to redesign workplaces by founding cooperative villages.
  • A cooperative village is a community in which workers jointly own factories and share the profits of their labor.
  • One such community was New Lanark in southern Scotland.
  • It was founded in 1786 and reorganized in 1800 by social reformer Robert Owen.
  • Owen wrote in an 1816 address that his goal for New Lanark was “to form a new character in the rising generation, by surrounding them from infancy with circumstances calculated to produce only good and useful habits.”
stem: The student wants to explain the goal of New Lanark using a quotation from Robert Owen. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: Founded in 1786 in southern Scotland, New Lanark was part of a 19th-century movement of European reformers who built cooperative villages.

Reorganized in 1800, New Lanark was a cooperative village created “to form a new character in the rising generation, by surrounding them from infancy with circumstances calculated to produce only good and useful habits,” according to its reformer Robert Owen.
Cooperative villages, such as New Lanark, reorganized by Robert Owen in 1800, were communities in which workers jointly owned factories and shared profits.
In an 1816 address, social reformer Robert Owen explained his goal “to form a new character in the rising generation.”

rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. This choice explains the goal of New Lanark—to shape the character of the rising generation by surrounding them from infancy with good influences—using a quotation from Robert Owen.

Choice A is incorrect. This choice provides background information about New Lanark, but it doesn’t explain its goals or include Owen’s words. Choice C is incorrect. This choice defines what a cooperative village is but doesn’t use Owen’s words to describe his vision for New Lanark. Choice D is incorrect. This choice only mentions part of Owen’s goal, and it doesn’t mention New Lanark at all.
